title: 2beon's Superflat
description: Superflat with all biomes but no structure.
body:
# Description
Superflat with all biomes but no structure(Including Village). However, Stronghold will still be generated.

![A superflat with animals, slimes, and biomes viewed from a Render Distance 128 chunks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/023162631ae19e6cba79d006d570d7d3a5b16056_0.webp)

This makes it a more difficult challenge since villages don't generate. However, biomes do generate, so it can be easy at times.

# Note
![Set to World Type: Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64226e71e987d87a2aa7a213cd6063245906fc84_0.webp)

Set the **World Type** to **Default** when applying this datapack. Superflat has no effect.

Datapack is based on this Youtube video [https://youtu.be/pvLlRyMtul8](https://youtu.be/pvLlRyMtul8)
